positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a fantastical, glowing bioluminescent woodland scene at twilight. The composition features a central archway formed by ancient, root-entangled tree trunks, through which subtle, starry-night glowing fireflies and exotic, trumpet-shaped glowing flowers are visible. The overall mood is magical, mysterious, and serene. Utilize deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted sharply with luminous neon accents (electric blue, lime green). Style should be a blend of detailed mystical stained glass and clean linework etching, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on fabric. Clean, bold silhouettes and graphic depth are essential. Cinematic rim lighting highlighting the edges of the flora. Isolated subject against a subtly gradient, dark forest background. Minimalist forest floor elements.
